title: caladium auritum
intro: Caladium auritum, also known as Elephant Ear, is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for wounds and skin conditions. The plant's medicinal properties also contribute to its health benefits, including the ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Caladium auritum is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
